headline: Retirees Chasing Monthly Cash Flow From This ETF May Be Surprised by the Fine Print
summary: EINC has returned 29.99% gain over the past year while continuing to pay quarterly distributions. For retirees and income-focused investors, that combination is worth understanding clearly before assuming the income stream is guaranteed. What EINC Actually Is VanEck Energy Income ETF (NYSEARCA:EINC) concentrates on midstream energy infrastructure: pipelines, processing facilities, and energy transportation networks. These ...
